info.title: Monitor Platform API
info.summary: Programmatic API for uptime monitoring, incidents, alerting, organization management, and auth.
info.description: This document covers the public `/api/v1` surface exposed by the Monitor platform. Organization resource routes support either the `auth-token` session cookie or an organization-scoped API key where documented.

tags.name: Monitors
tags.description: Uptime monitor CRUD and manual checks.

tags.name: PayID
tags.description: PayID OAuth and KYC integration routes.

tags.name: System
tags.description: Internal system automation and error reporting.

sessionCookieAuth.name: auth-token
sessionCookieAuth.description: Signed session cookie returned by the platform auth flows.

apiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
apiKeyAuth.description: Organization-scoped API key created through the API keys endpoints.

bearerApiKeyAuth.description: Alternative form for organization API keys using the Authorization header.

authTokenHeader.name: auth-token
authTokenHeader.description: Header-based auth used by PayID integration routes.

cronSecretHeader.name: x-monitor-cron-secret
cronSecretHeader.description: Shared secret for internal cron execution.

cronBearerSecret.description: Alternative bearer form for the cron shared secret.

secret.description: Plaintext secret returned only once at creation time.

post.summary: Log in with email and password

post.summary: Request a one-time password over email
Create or rotate an organization invite
Set the active organization in the session
Join an organization with an invite token

get.summary: List organizations for the current user
Get a specific KYC session status
Get the current user's KYC status

post.summary: Start or submit a KYC verification flow
Request a PayID OAuth magic link
Report a client-side error to the backend

get.summary: List referrals for the current user

post.summary: Save a referral code or relationship for the current user
